title: [Ibis] Allow multiple return values for `ibis.method`
body: The prior motivation for a single return value was to enforce... well, exactly that. However, this is nothing but a pain, requiring the user to tupel/struct-ify return values at a high level. This is a trivial transformation that can be done down the line. Allowing multiple return values, however, allows this op to play much more nicely with other passes and code that expects function-like operations (and terminators of said ops) to -generally speaking - accept multiple return values.
